weekend.too_broke: You were too broke to do anything this weekend.
weekend.ticket_baseball: You went to the baseball game this weekend and ate hotdogs till you puked.
weekend.ticket_theatre: You went to the theatre this weekend and saw the one MAN version of Cats.
weekend.ticket_concert: You had front row seats at a rock concert. The doctor said that the hearing loss shouldn't be permanent.
weekend.durable_refrigerator: You spent the whole weekend watching some of the food in your refrigerator grow mold and spores. It sure was fun.
weekend.durable_freezer: You spent the whole weekend watching the water in your refrigerator freeze.
weekend.durable_stove: You spent the whole weekend baking oatmeal cookies.
weekend.durable_color_tv: You spent the entire weekend watching Star Trek reruns.
weekend.durable_vcr: You rented some movies and ate artificially flavored buttered popcorn.
weekend.durable_stereo: You spent the weekend playing your stereo and patching the plaster your speakers cracked.
weekend.durable_microwave: You spent the weekend cleaning your microwave after you tried to dry your pet rat in it. You also need a new pet rat.
weekend.durable_hot_tub: You and some friends had a hot tub party this weekend.
weekend.random_0: You watched them change the mannequins at QT Clothing this weekend.
weekend.random_1: You washed and waxed your marble this weekend right before it rained.
weekend.random_2: You stayed home and did absolutely nothing this weekend.
weekend.random_3: You spent the weekend hiking around Yosemite.
weekend.random_4: You listened to the Talking Bear 256 times this weekend.
weekend.random_5: You read the 'Wall Street Journal' this weekend.
weekend.random_6: You thought about what you would do on your next turn.
weekend.random_7: You spent the weekend in a hotel because they had to fumigate your apartment.
weekend.random_8: You played in a ping pong tournament this weekend.
weekend.random_9: You pitched horseshoes in your apartment all weekend. The people downstairs love you.
weekend.random_10: You sat around and played solitaire all weekend.
weekend.random_11: You went panning for gold this weekend, but all you got was wet.
weekend.random_12: You spent the weekend in the laundromat washing your clothes. Now that was exciting.
weekend.random_13: You took a friend out to a cheap restaurant this weekend.
weekend.random_14: You went out and caught your own froglegs this weekend.
weekend.random_15: You crawled around on your knees chasing snails this weekend.
weekend.random_16: You spent your weekend thinking about work. Eccch.
weekend.random_17: You spent your weekend trying to remove the mildew between the shower tiles.
weekend.random_18: You spent the weekend listening to the newlyweds in the next apartment set up a new waterbed.
weekend.random_19: This weekend, you won first prize in a beauty contest and collected $10. Whoops, wrong game.
weekend.random_20: This weekend, you closed your curtains, locked your doors, turned off the lights, and ate presweetened morning breakfast cereal, with little marshmallows!
weekend.random_21: You played stickball this weekend with the neighborhood kids and ended up wrenching your back and spraining your ankle.
weekend.random_22: You read a romance novel, NURSE'S TURN TO CRY, in one sitting.
weekend.random_23: You took a long hot bath this weekend and emerged looking like a California Raisin.
weekend.random_24: You watched a torrid romance movie, LIBRARIAN'S DILEMMA, this weekend.
weekend.random_25: One of your fillings came loose this weekend. It's a good thing you're handy with a soldering iron.
weekend.random_26: You spent the weekend examining yourself under the fluorescent lights in the bathroom. Eccch!
weekend.random_27: You spent the weekend wondering if black holes were lit with black lights.
weekend.random_28: This weekend, you hung out at the mall, filled up on junk food, and made your mother ashamed of you.
weekend.random_29: You went bowling with friends this weekend.
weekend.random_30: You played two rounds of golf this weekend.
weekend.random_31: This weekend, you had to bail your nephew out of jail.
weekend.random_32: You had your marble repainted this weekend.
weekend.random_33: You played in a volleyball tournament this weekend.
weekend.random_34: You took a friend out to an expensive restaurant this weekend.
weekend.random_35: You went to San Diego to play in the Over The Line Tournament.
weekend.random_36: You went to Las Vegas in a $20,000 car and came back in a $200,000 Greyhound bus.
weekend.random_37: You tried to drive to Hawaii to watch a surfing contest.
weekend.random_38: You went scuba diving in La Jolla.
weekend.random_39: You went deep sea fishing this weekend.
weekend.random_40: You volunteered to take the local scouts to Disneyland.
weekend.random_41: You drove the senior citizens' bus this weekend and they drove you - crazy.

greeting: Welcome to the Pawn Shop. Nothing is too hot for us to handle.
